title: Quality Management System Regulation (harmonized with ISO 13485)

changes.label: Design controls now harmonized with ISO 13485 §7.3 — same structure required
changes.action: Update design control procedure to align with ISO 13485 §7.3 requirements; reformat design history file if needed

changes.label: Purchasing controls expanded — supplier evaluation now requires risk-based approach
changes.action: Update supplier qualification procedure to include risk classification and risk-based oversight frequency

changes.label: Process validation requirements expanded and aligned with ISO 13485
changes.action: Conduct gap assessment of validated processes against QMSR requirements; update validation SOPs

changes.label: CAPA must now explicitly reference risk management outputs
changes.action: Link CAPA procedure to risk management file; add risk assessment step to CAPA initiation form

changes.label: Complaint handling now requires complaint trend analysis at defined intervals
changes.action: Add complaint trend analysis step to complaint handling SOP with defined periodicity and report format

title: Unique Device Identification (UDI)

changes.label: UDI issuing agency accreditation requirements updated
changes.action: Verify your UDI issuing agency (GS1, HIBCC, ICCBBA) is currently FDA-accredited; update records

changes.label: UDI-DI change triggers list updated — new changes requiring new UDI defined
changes.action: Update change control SOP to include UDI-DI change assessment step using current FDA trigger list

changes.label: GUDID submission requirements and data elements updated
changes.action: Audit GUDID records for completeness against current required data elements; update any missing fields

title: Cybersecurity in Medical Devices: Quality System Considerations and Premarket Submissions

changes.label: Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) now mandatory for all connected devices
changes.action: Establish SBOM generation process; include SBOM in premarket submission for all network-connected devices

changes.label: Cybersecurity testing must cover entire device lifecycle including post-market
changes.action: Develop post-market cybersecurity monitoring plan; establish vulnerability disclosure policy

changes.label: Structured Product Labeling (SPL) for cybersecurity information required in submissions
changes.action: Update premarket submission template to include cybersecurity SPL section

changes.label: Patch management plan required as part of design output
changes.action: Develop and document patch management plan; include in design output documentation

changes.label: Updated list of recognized cybersecurity standards and frameworks
changes.action: Review cybersecurity design against NIST CSF 2.0 and IEC 81001-5-1; document mapping

title: Regulation on medical devices (consolidated 2026)

changes.label: QMS must cover all aspects of MDR lifecycle — design through post-market
changes.action: Verify QMS scope statement explicitly covers all Art.10 elements; update QM if gaps identified

changes.label: Clinical evaluation must be based on clinical data — literature alone insufficient for most devices
changes.action: Review CER methodology; ensure clinical investigation data or PMCF data is included where required

changes.label: PMS system and PMCF plan mandatory for all CE-marked devices
changes.action: Establish PMS plan, PMCF plan, PSUR (class IIb/III) or PMS report (class I/IIa) schedule

changes.label: EUDAMED registration required — mandatory modules being phased in
changes.action: Register in EUDAMED; monitor activation dates for UDI, clinical investigation, vigilance modules

changes.label: GSPR (General Safety and Performance Requirements) — full compliance required
changes.action: Conduct GSPR checklist review; document compliance or non-applicability for each requirement

title: Medical electrical equipment — Part 2-44: X-ray equipment for computed tomography

changes.label: Dose display requirements updated in A2:2016 — CTDI and DLP must be displayed before scan
changes.action: Verify dose display implementation meets A2:2016 requirements; update verification protocol

changes.label: Automatic exposure control (AEC) testing requirements added
changes.action: Add AEC performance testing procedure to verification and validation protocol

changes.label: Essential performance requirements for CT image quality updated
changes.action: Review image quality verification tests against A2:2016 essential performance requirements

title: Medical devices — Part 1: Application of usability engineering

changes.label: Intended user population definition expanded in A1:2020
changes.action: Review and update intended user profile in usability engineering file to reflect A1 requirements

changes.label: Formative and summative evaluation criteria and documentation clarified
changes.action: Update usability evaluation protocol to distinguish formative/summative objectives and document rationale

changes.label: Critical task identification now requires documented rationale
changes.action: Add justification documentation to critical task identification in UFMEA

changes.label: Known use problems must now explicitly reference field data
changes.action: Update use-error analysis to include post-market use-error data from complaints and vigilance

title: Biological evaluation — Part 1: Evaluation and testing within a risk management process
Biological evaluation — Part 11: Tests for systemic toxicity
Biological evaluation — Part 13: Identification and quantification of degradation products from polymeric medical devices

changes.label: Polymer degradation product identification methodology updated
changes.action: Verify polymer degradation study protocols align with current ISO 10993-13 test methods

changes.label: Reporting requirements for degradation studies clarified
changes.action: Update degradation study report template to include all required elements per §6

title: Biological evaluation — Part 17: Establishment of permissible limits for leachable substances
Biological evaluation — Part 18: Chemical characterization of medical device materials
Biological evaluation — Part 2: Animal welfare requirements

changes.label: 3Rs principles (Replace, Reduce, Refine) now mandatory consideration before any animal testing
changes.action: Update animal testing justification template to include formal 3Rs consideration and alternatives assessment

changes.label: Non-animal methods must be systematically evaluated and documented before in vivo studies
changes.action: Add non-animal alternatives screening step to biocompatibility testing plan

changes.label: Welfare assessment requirements for animals used in testing expanded
changes.action: Ensure contract laboratories comply with 2022 welfare requirements; include in supplier audit checklist

title: Biological evaluation — Part 3: Tests for genotoxicity, carcinogenicity, reproductive
Biological evaluation — Part 5: Tests for in vitro cytotoxicity
Biological evaluation — Part 6: Tests for local effects after implantation
Medical devices — Quality management systems — Requirements for regulatory purposes
Medical devices � Application of risk management to medical devices
Medical devices — Application of risk management to medical devices
Symbols to be used with information to be supplied by the manufacturer — Part 1

changes.label: 17 new symbols added in 2021 revision
changes.action: Review labelling to assess if new symbols should replace text-based information; update IFU and packaging

changes.label: Symbol usage conditions clarified — some symbols now require accompanying text in specific contexts
changes.action: Audit existing labelling against updated symbol usage conditions; correct non-compliant uses

changes.label: Validation and testing requirements for symbol legibility updated
changes.action: Confirm symbol legibility studies meet 2021 requirements; re-validate if symbols were reduced in size

title: Nomenclature — Guidance for nomenclature system for medical devices

changes.label: Nomenclature structure updated to align with EUDAMED EMDN classification
changes.action: Verify EMDN codes assigned in EUDAMED are consistent with ISO 15225:2023 nomenclature structure

changes.label: Coding rules for combination products and accessories updated
changes.action: Review nomenclature assignments for combination products and accessories against 2023 edition

title: Medical devices — Information to be supplied by the manufacturer

changes.label: Digital IFU (eIFU) conditions formalized — paper IFU may be omitted under specific conditions
changes.action: Assess eIFU eligibility; if adopting eIFU, establish compliant system per §5.4 and notify competent authority

changes.label: Minimum required information elements updated and expanded
changes.action: Audit IFU and labelling content against updated §6 checklist; address any missing required elements

changes.label: Language requirements for multi-market devices clarified
changes.action: Confirm IFU language coverage meets requirements for all markets where device is placed

title: Quality management systems — Requirements
Definitions/descriptions and formats of the UDI core elements for systems or procedure packs

changes.label: UDI-DI change triggers — significant changes requiring new UDI-DI clarified
changes.action: Update change management SOP with UDI-DI change assessment step; train RA team on trigger list

changes.label: UDI carrier placement requirements updated for combination products and accessories
changes.action: Verify UDI carrier placement on all device packaging; update labelling specification if needed

changes.label: EUDAMED UDI database submission requirements and timelines clarified
changes.action: Confirm GUDID/EUDAMED submission status for all marketed devices; plan for mandatory EUDAMED phase-in

title: Summary of safety and clinical performance

changes.label: SSCP structure and mandatory sections updated in Rev.1
changes.action: Review existing SSCP against Rev.1 template; update structure and content to match current requirements

changes.label: Plain language summary requirements clarified — readability validation now expected
changes.action: Conduct readability testing of SSCP plain language summary with representative lay users

changes.label: SSCP update triggers now explicitly listed — PMS data must trigger SSCP review
changes.action: Link SSCP review to PMS/PMCF and PSUR cycle; add SSCP review step to annual QMS review procedure

title: Clinical evaluation assessment report template (supplementary)

changes.label: Clinical Evaluation Assessment Report (CEAR) template introduced as NB reference
changes.action: Align technical documentation clinical evaluation section structure with CEAR template requirements

changes.label: Equivalence claims require explicit NB agreement and documentation of access to data
changes.action: If using equivalence: document contractual access to equivalent device data; prepare equivalence justification matrix

changes.label: State of the art definition must be explicitly addressed in CER
changes.action: Add explicit "state of the art" section to CER; reference relevant standards, guidance and clinical literature

title: Clinical investigation application/notification documents

changes.label: Clinical investigation application dossier structure standardized across EU MSs
changes.action: Update clinical investigation SOP to use standardized application dossier structure per MDCG 2021-8 template

changes.label: Substantial modification criteria for clinical investigations defined
changes.action: Update clinical investigation change management procedure to include MDCG 2021-8 modification assessment

changes.label: Notification procedure for PMCF investigations clarified
changes.action: Review PMCF study notification pathway; confirm which MS require full application vs. notification only

title: Guidance on Periodic Safety Update Report (PSUR) according to Regulation (EU) 2017/745

changes.label: PSUR submission deadline clarified: 30 calendar days after end of reference period
changes.action: Update SOP-PV-002: specify 30-day deadline in submission checklist; set calendar reminders per device

changes.label: Benefit-risk ratio analysis section now mandatory in PSUR
changes.action: Update PSUR template to include quantitative benefit-risk analysis referencing ISO 14971:2019 §9

changes.label: PSUR must trigger SSCP update if safety signals detected
changes.action: Link PSUR process to SSCP review; add gate in SOP-PV-002 to initiate SSCP update on safety signal

changes.label: PSUR template updated — 3 new mandatory fields (UDI-DI, reference period dates, risk class)
changes.action: Update PSUR template F-PV-015 with new mandatory fields; verify all existing PSURs are being updated

title: Device Specific Vigilance Guidance (DSVG) Template

changes.label: Device-Specific Vigilance Guidance (DSVG) template introduced for incident reporting
changes.action: Review DSVG templates relevant to your device type; update vigilance SOP to reference applicable DSVGs

changes.label: Device-specific incident definitions and reporting thresholds clarified per device type
changes.action: Update incident triage procedure with DSVG-specific thresholds for each device type in your portfolio

changes.label: Trend reporting analysis methodology now device-specific
changes.action: Update trend reporting SOP to apply DSVG-specific statistical methods where applicable

title: Clinical evaluation of orphan medical devices

changes.label: Specific clinical evidence requirements for orphan medical devices defined
changes.action: If device is for rare condition: update clinical evaluation plan to include orphan device evidence justification framework

changes.label: Literature search methodology must explicitly address limited evidence situation
changes.action: Update CER methodology section to document search strategy adaptations for rare disease limited literature

changes.label: PMCF requirements for orphan devices — registry-based data accepted as primary evidence
changes.action: Establish orphan-device specific PMCF plan; consider patient registry participation as PMCF method
